post.summary: Creates one or more returns order headers.

get.summary: Reads the header of a specific returns order.

patch.summary: Updates the header of a specific returns order.
patch.description: Updates the header data of a specific returns order, which the consumer specifies by passing the returns order number.

delete.description: Deletes a specific returns order, which the consumer specifies by passing the returns order number.Deleting a header also deletes all related entities such as business partners, pricing elements, items, and so on.

parameters.name: CustomerReturn

delete.summary: Deletes a specific value-added service of a returns order item.
delete.description: Deletes the data of a specific value-added service item using returns order ID, item number, value-added service type, and value-added subservice type. You can use this operation by activating the business function ISR_RETAILSYSTEM.

post.description: Rejects the approval request for a specific returns order. Consumer must pass the returns order number.
Releases the approval request for a specific returns order. Consumer must pass the returns order number.
